blocks.content:
## Extensibility & Platform Strategy

*Building the platform other teams build on*

Master APIs, SDKs, and plugin systems; the platform-product boundary; cross-product leverage; velocity versus platform health; GA readiness; multi-quarter roadmapping; and B2A API design.

## Modules in This Level

### 7.9 B2A — Agents as API Consumers

The Interface Assumption Shift

### 7.1 Extensibility as Platform Strategy

### 7.2 APIs, SDKs, and Plugin Systems

### 7.3 The Platform-Product Boundary

### 7.6 GA Readiness — From Beta to Production
